---
title: "*The ΔS-sentials of Calculating Entropy Changes * (Calculating Entropy Changes) Reference Page"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
html-math-method: mathjax
---
::: {.callout-important title="Still Under Construction!"}
This web page is just a bare outline. The complete details have not been filled in yet.
:::
# Intro to *The ΔS-sentials of Calculating Entropy Changes *

Main title explanation

## The ΔS-sentials of Calculating Entropy Changes 

Video 1 explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/z2e5Rq5r288?si=h073olXQ9GIgvabg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](../../NotYetHere.qmd)

# Examples and Definitions

## Examples Links

## Definitions

# Other Links and Videos

## Other Links

## Previous and Following Videos

### The video previous to the previous video (i.e., two videos back)

**React Harder: Formation Heats and Alternate Endings**<br/>*2 more Examples of the 1^st^ Law for Chemical Reactions*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/iqxJP6g-Qsc), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/Example1stLawForReactingSystemsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/112-EnergeticsOfReactionsPt2Visuals.qmd)

### The previous video (i.e., one video back)

**Resistance is Futile. Entropy Always Wins**<br/>*Intro to 2^nd^ Law*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/yqVUz1WA7M4), [Info Page](../../balances/entropy/IntroTo2ndLawVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/entropy/113-Visuals.qmd)

### The next video (i.e., one video forward)

**Sadi Carnot and the Power of Fire, the 1824 Edition Part 1**<br/>*The Air-Standard Carnot Cycle*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/EDJQAvBIAok), [Info Page](../../balances/entropy/TheCarnotCycleVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/entropy/116-Visuals.qmd)

### The next after next video (i.e. two videos forward)

**Sadi Carnot and the Power of Fire, the 1824 Edition Part 2**<br/>*The Steam Carnot Cycle*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/Qc9W1KKpouU), [Info Page](../../balances/entropy/TheCarnotCycleVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/entropy/116.5-Visuals.qmd)
